creator: diizzy@FreeBSD.org
text:
Created attachment 224240
Patch for gearmand-devel

Unmaintained, obsolete and hasn't compiled for over half a year
Main port is also unmaintained, out of date and broken on most platforms however upstream is still active as far as I can tell but there's no need to keep -devel around.

References:
https://www.freshports.org/devel/gearmand-devel/
https://portsfallout.com/fallout?port=devel%2Fgearmand-devel$
https://github.com/gearman/gearmand
